Buyer's question

Fractional CMO New York / NYC Remote-first fractional CMO for NYC B2B.

Treetop works with New York City B2B mid-market companies on a remote-first basis. NYC has unique market characteristics — financial services density, professional services, B2B media — that shape the right marketing approach. Here's the framework.

Short answer

Treetop offers remote-first fractional CMO services to NYC B2B mid-market companies. Particularly relevant for financial services, professional services, and B2B media verticals concentrated in New York. \$8K-\$25K/month typical.

By Bill Colbert · Founder, Treetop Growth Strategy
Published May 2026 · More from the library

NYC B2B market characteristics

New York's B2B economy is concentrated in a few high-value verticals that share characteristics:

  • Financial services / fintech — dense buyer base, sophisticated buyers, compliance-aware marketing required.
  • Professional services — consulting firms, law firms, accounting practices, agencies. Trust-driven marketing is the right pattern.
  • B2B media + marketing tech — densest cluster in the country.
  • Real estate B2B — proptech, brokerages, property management.
  • Healthcare B2B — large hospital systems, payors, healthcare IT.

Marketing implications

  • Generic AI hype doesn't land in NYC buyer culture — substance wins.
  • Trust marketing (case studies, relationships, references) outperforms broad-reach campaigns.
  • Compliance-aware messaging is required in finserv and healthcare.
  • In-person events and conferences still meaningful here in a way they aren't elsewhere.
  • Bylined operator-led content from NYC executives reads as authority.

Treetop's NYC engagement model

  • Remote-first with quarterly on-site visits.
  • 1-2 days per week typical cadence.
  • Builder profile — we ship, we don't just present.
  • AI-fluent — modern fractional CMO work compounds with AI workflows.
  • 12-18 month commitments for compounding outcomes.

Best-fit NYC clients

  • B2B fintech, financial services, or professional services firms at $3M-$30M ARR/revenue.
  • Hybrid or remote-friendly teams (we cannot be in NYC five days a week).
  • Operators who want AI-augmented marketing operations, not just AI-themed talk.
  • Founder-led marketing that has hit its limit.

FAQ

Do you have an NYC office?

No. Remote-first with on-site visits.

How often will you be in NYC?

Quarterly typically. More for kickoff.

Do you work with East Coast hours?

Yes — primary operating hours are Eastern/Central time.

Do you work with financial services?

Yes — common engagement profile.

Do you handle compliance-aware marketing?

Yes — we work with regulated finserv and have built marketing engines that respect FINRA/SEC constraints.
